name: agentic-sdlc
description: Agentic Software Development Lifecycle — end-to-end AI-driven workflow from idea to platform-ready issues. Covers requirement grilling, PRD writing, project constitution (with DDD bounded-context mapping, tiered branch/promotion CI models, and scoped amendment of an existing constitution), feature decomposition, TDD test planning, issue structuring, PMS delivery, domain-parallel agentic implementation (Ralph), and bug reporting.
